summary: Iteration 102: Communications Hub Operator Filter bug fix verified. ServiceCommunicationsHub component now accepts operatorId prop and includes it in API calls for support-tickets, ratings, and promotions. All 9 management pages pass scopeOperatorId to ServiceCommunicationsHub. When admin selects an operator in scope filter, Communications tab re-fetches data with that operator_id.

minor.issue: Backend accepts operator_id param but doesn't filter by it (only role-based scoping). Frontend sends param but backend ignores it for admin users.
Backend accepts operator_id param but doesn't filter by it. Frontend sends param but backend ignores it.

critical_code_review_comments: ServiceCommunicationsHub.jsx correctly accepts operatorId prop (line 26: operatorId: propOperatorId = '')
ServiceCommunicationsHub.jsx builds opParam and includes in API calls (lines 52, 55, 60, 68)
All 9 management pages pass operatorId={scopeOperatorId} to ServiceCommunicationsHub
Promotions API (/api/subscriptions/promotions) correctly filters by operator_id query param

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Communications Hub verified with operator filter on Travel Management page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Communications Hub operator filter feature verified. ServiceCommunicationsHub component receives operatorId prop from all 9 management pages. When admin selects an operator, the Communications tab re-fetches data with operator_id param. Promotions API correctly filters by operator_id. Support-tickets and ratings APIs accept the param but don't filter by it (they use role-based scoping instead). Known operators: Musango Bus Service (travel), Oryno Travel & Hospitality (multi), West Region Tours (travel).

features: ServiceCommunicationsHub resolves operatorId from prop or user.operator_id
ServiceCommunicationsHub includes operator_id in API calls
All 9 management pages pass scopeOperatorId to ServiceCommunicationsHub
OperatorScopeFilter dropdown shows operators filtered by service type
Selecting operator triggers data re-fetch in Communications tab
